headline: Pfizer’s Broader Pneumococcal Vaccine Push Might Change The Case For Investing In Pfizer (PFE)
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Pfizer reported positive Phase 2 results for its investigational 25‑valent pneumococcal conjugate vaccine in infants, showing strong immune responses versus PREVNAR 20 and prompting the launch of a pivotal Phase 3 pediatric program. The move to a broader 25‑strain infant vaccine candidate, alongside plans for a fifth‑generation 35‑valent adult vaccine, highlights how Pfizer is aiming to extend its long-standing pneumococcal franchise through higher‑value, next‑generation...

headline: Pfizer’s VEPPANU License With Rigel Adds New Angle To PFE Story
summary: Pfizer and its partners have granted Rigel Pharmaceuticals an exclusive license to commercialize VEPPANU (vepdegestrant), the first FDA approved oral PROTAC for advanced breast cancer. The agreement follows Phase 3 data that support clinical benefit in a difficult to treat patient group and inclusion of VEPPANU in NCCN breast cancer guidelines. The deal introduces a new commercialization pathway for VEPPANU and adds another partnership driven revenue channel for Pfizer. For investors...
